channel.title: Laser Cutting on My Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Laser Cutting on My Personal Blog

item.title: ATOS IT Rack Doors
item.description:
One of the last series of laser-cut metal doors that BULL/ATOS put on their Sequana racks.

As with the metal facades of the Bullion B (last post), all this has been abandoned and replaced by plastic… a pity but understandable…

These 40 doors will serve as a base for new creations, furniture, lamps and other wall decorations
